query:
-- Services
SELECT externalId, planName, serviceType, provider, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue, status, phoneNumber, avcId
FROM services 
WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0087'
ORDER BY serviceType, planName;

-- Billing items
SELECT id, description, unitAmount, quantity, lineAmount, contactName, serviceExternalId, accountCode
FROM billing_items 
WHERE contactName LIKE '%Emergency%' OR contactName LIKE '%Medicine%' OR contactName LIKE '%EMF%'
ORDER BY lineAmount DESC;

SELECT id, description, unitAmount, quantity, lineAmount, contactName, serviceExternalId, accountCode
FROM billing_items 
WHERE contactName LIKE '%Emergency%' OR contactName LIKE '%Medicine%' OR contactName LIKE '%EMF%'
ORDER BY lineAmount DESC;
